investigator.droppedAggregateNote: Approximately 58 additional candidate URLs attempted via WebFetch and curl; all returned HTTP 403 or 'Host not in allowlist'. Affected domains include venturebeat.com, bloomberg.com, axios.com, siliconangle.com, alibabacloud.com, marktechpost.com, businesswire.com, 9to5google.com, techtimes.com, simonwillison.net, cnbc.com, huggingface.co, arxiv.org, blockchain.news, ibtimes.com, reuters.com, apnews.com, finance.yahoo.com, hpcwire.com, and approximately 39 others. All three documented recovery steps (browser-UA curl, r.jina.ai reader proxy, Wayback Machine via curl) failed uniformly.
investigator.systemicNote: SYSTEMIC FETCH FAILURE: The egress proxy in this environment blocks outbound HTTPS to essentially all external domains. WebSearch was the only tool to successfully reach external content. All 12 recorded rows use verbatim HTML page titles extracted by the WebSearch crawler as excerpts.

verifier.notes: minConfidence was explicitly provided as 0.6. All 12 rows carry excerptVerified:true with non-empty excerpts; none failed the defensive gate. Structural caveat across the entire batch: all excerpts are search-indexed page titles captured under proxy-blocked conditions — no article body text was retrieved for any row. All 12 rows clear the 0.6 threshold.
